title: Olam Haba vs. Gan Eden vs. Gehinnom: The Jewish Afterlife Mapped
title_zh: 来世(Olam Haba)、伊甸园(Gan Eden)与地狱(Gehinnom):犹太教来世观地图
title_he: עולם הבא מול גן עדן מול גיהנום: מפת העולם הבא היהודי
description: Clarifying the different Jewish concepts of the afterlife — the World to Come, the Garden of Eden, and the purification of Gehinnom.
chinese_historical_periods: Warring States period through Han Dynasty (汉朝)
sources: Maimonides, Mishneh Torah, Laws of Repentance, Chapter 8
